title: CI VMs: need git-daemon

comments.body:
> I know you've been busy building new CI VMs

Actually once we're past updating to a new OS version, building updated images becomes boring/routine.  In any case, almost always the real challenge is actually getting the target repo.'s CI to pass with the updated images - though recently that's been pretty smooth as well.

> make sure they rpm- and apt-install git-daemon

I can't add those w/o also building new images.  But we can ignore the result if you wish (assuming it builds successfully)...
This looks like it was done. Reopen if I am mistaken.
